---
title: "Drafts"
draft: true
---

*Not published. Visible locally at `/drafts` during `quarto preview`.*

| Post | Status |
|------|--------|
| [What Is Sonification?](posts/2026-04-20-what-is-sonification/index.qmd) | In progress |
| [On Pain, and Being Known](posts/2025-04-30-on-pain-and-being-known/index.qmd) | In progress |
| [On Hesse, Psychoanalysis and the Bildungsroman](posts/2024-02-27-on-hesse/index.qmd) | In progress |
| [Spatial Economics — A Brief Overview](posts/2021-10-26-spatial-economics/index.qmd) | In progress |
| [The Economics of Music Sampling](posts/2020-11-19-economics-of-music-sampling/index.qmd) | In progress |
